---
title: Start a New Discussion
---

# Start a New Discussion

Before opening a new discussion, please check if a similar one already exists.

Choose one of the following categories for your discussion:

### 💬 General

For general conversations and topics that don't fit into the other categories.

### ✨ Ideas

For proposing new features, enhancements, or improvements.

### ❓ Q&A

For asking questions about the project, its usage, or its architecture.

---

Please provide a clear and descriptive title and be as detailed as possible in your post.
